title: QueerDefense Survey 2025
description: The survey examines the experiences of lesbians living in Finland regarding hate speech and harassment, as well as how incidents of harassment have been reported. First, respondents were asked about their observations and experiences of hate speech targeting LGBTQ+ people. The survey also examined how hostility appears in different environments, such as the media, and interpersonal interactions. In addition, it was examined whether hostile statements have increased and from which sources respond
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
